hero.badge: Now in Beta — Join the waitlist
hero.subtitle: Every birthday remembered. Every visit followed up. Every loyal customer thanked — automatically.

preview.title: Automata Dashboard
preview.birthdayDesc: Send personalized offers on customer birthdays
preview.happyHourDesc: Happy hour alerts for nearby customers

comparison.title: The Old Way Is Broken
comparison.subtitle: Traditional apps put the cart before the horse. You build features hoping customers will come. Automata flips the script.

features.title: Everything You Need to Automate Customer Relationships
features.subtitle: Powerful tools that work together seamlessly

dataImport.title: Easy Data Import
dataImport.desc: Upload your customer list via CSV or enter manually. Add custom fields that matter to your business.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Weekly, monthly, or event-based triggers. AI optimizes send times for maximum engagement.

aiProposals.title: AI-Powered Proposals
aiProposals.desc: Our AI analyzes your business and customers, then suggests automations tailored to your goals.

multiChannel.title: Multi-Channel Delivery
multiChannel.desc: Reach customers via email or SMS. Each message personalized with their unique details.

humanLoop.title: Human in the Loop
humanLoop.desc: AI proposes, you approve. Full control over every automation before it goes live.

analytics.title: Real-Time Analytics
analytics.desc: Track engagement, measure growth, and see which automations drive the most value.

howItWorks.title: From Data to Relationships in 4 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in minutes, not months

step1.title: Upload Your Customers
step1.desc: Import your existing customer list via CSV or add them manually. Include whatever data matters — birthdays, locations, preferences.

step2.title: Tell Us About Your Business
step2.desc: Share your business type, goals, and what success looks like. This context helps our AI make smarter suggestions.

step3.title: Review AI Suggestions
step3.desc: Our AI analyzes your data and proposes 5-10 tailored automations. Review each one, edit if needed, and approve with one click.

step4.title: Watch Relationships Grow
step4.desc: Automations run on your schedule. Customers receive personalized messages. You focus on what matters — your business.

templates.title: Ready-to-Use Automations
templates.subtitle: Browse our library of proven templates. Customize and launch in minutes.

birthday.title: Birthday Rewards
birthday.desc: Automatically send personalized birthday offers to customers. Boost loyalty and drive repeat visits.

loyalty.title: Loyalty Points Program
loyalty.desc: Reward repeat customers automatically. Track points and send redemption reminders.

happyHour.title: Happy Hour Alerts
happyHour.desc: Notify nearby customers about happy hour specials. Drive foot traffic during slow hours.

appointment.title: Appointment Reminders
appointment.desc: Reduce no-shows with automated reminders. Send via SMS or email 24 hours before.

postVisit.title: Post-Visit Follow-up
postVisit.desc: Thank customers after their visit and ask for feedback. Build relationships that last.

winBack.title: Win-Back Campaign
winBack.desc: Re-engage customers who haven't visited in 30+ days with personalized offers.

testimonials.title: Loved by Businesses Everywhere
testimonials.subtitle: See what our customers have to say

quote1.text: We went from manually texting 50 customers to automatically engaging 5,000 — without hiring anyone. Our repeat visits are up 40%.
quote1.author: Maria Rodriguez
quote1.title: Owner, Casa del Sol Restaurant

pricing.title: Simple pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. No credit card required.
pricing.annualNote: Save 20% with annual billing. See full details

enterprise.title: Need more power?
enterprise.desc: For organizations with 25,000+ customers, custom integrations, or compliance requirements.

cta.title: Be the First to Automate Your Customer Relationships
cta.subtitle: Join the waitlist and get early access to AI-powered automations.
cta.note: We'll notify you when we launch.

outgoing.title: Outgoing Messages
outgoing.subtitle: Your command center for all scheduled messages. Monitor, pause, cancel, or reschedule any automation message before it's sent.
outgoing.featuresTitle: What you'll be able to do
outgoing.feature1: View all scheduled SMS and email messages in one place
outgoing.feature2: Filter by project, automation, channel, or date range
outgoing.feature3: Pause, cancel, or reschedule individual messages
outgoing.feature4: Bulk actions to manage multiple messages at once
outgoing.feature5: Real-time delivery status and error tracking
